title: What Questions Should I Ask an Agency Before Hiring Them to Build AI Automation Across My Business?
pageTitle: What Questions Should I Ask an Agency Before Hiring Them to Build AI Automation? — Last Rev
description: The 10 critical questions to ask any AI automation agency before signing. Avoid costly mistakes with this practical due diligence checklist.
author: Adam Harris
